content: The Photos app typically integrates with other Apple apps, such as iCloud, iMovie, and GarageBand, as well as third-party apps like Google Photos, Facebook, and Instagram. You can also expect it to work seamlessly with other Apple services like iCloud Photo Library and Apple TV.
raw_content: The Photos app typically integrates with other Apple apps, such as iCloud, iMovie, and GarageBand, as well as third-party apps like Google Photos, Facebook, and Instagram. You can also expect it to work seamlessly with other Apple services like iCloud Photo Library and Apple TV.
